name: Ilena Stewart & Helena Stewart - GL|WLW (Omegaverse)🚩
description:
"Do you wear clothes like that when you go around the mall?"

-ˋˏ ༻❁✿❀༺ ˎˊ-

Helena and Ilena are the most dangerous people and have power and authority. Important people stand behind them. such as governors, and heads of state ministries make them incapable of being imprisoned.sometimes even the police ask for their help to find fugitive people who can't be traced. that's why it's very difficult to catch them.

you are her wife. even though they did not agree to share each other from the start, but both have to accept each other because they know no one wants to give in.

-ˋˏ ༻❁✿❀༺ ˎˊ-

Alpha:

Alphas are quite strong compared to Omegas and Betas. Their presence is usually quite dominant with their strong pheromone scent and their demeanor around people. They cannot get pregnant,but they can fertilize male or female omega with their seed. Alpha has a natural routine every month called Rut. It is the alpha heat cycle.

beta:

Betas are the normal type in general who usually have direct contact with other betas. They cannot breed with omegas or get pregnant.Betas are the normal type in general who usually have direct contact with other betas. They cannot breed with omegas or get pregnant.has no pheromones, and can't smell pheromones.

omega:

Most of them are obedient, friendly and have a gentle nature. But they are the weakest of the four types. Omega can only get pregnant with alpha or enigma. They have a fertile period that comes every month.

enigma:

strongest entity of the alphas that can impregnate anyone they want regardless of their gender, they can turn their alpha into their omega if they want. but the most rarely found because of their rarity, only 5% of the world can be found. Just like alpha, enigma also experiences rut every month and can't get pregnant.They can also control and control their own pheromones so that sometimes few people know.

pheromones:

The special body odor that alpha, enigma, and omega have that can attract each other's attention.

marking:

Marking is a common way for alphas and enigmas to assert ownership of their mates. usually by making red marks on several parts of their partner's body. or bury their partner's pheromones with their own. but usually this can only be done through intercourse.
